projects.title: Life Sciences Intelligence Workspace
projects.shortContext: Unified research workspace for life sciences teams to explore and annotate datasets.
projects.problem: Researchers needed a unified interface to find, correlate and annotate diverse datasets quickly.
projects.solution: Built a product-focused workspace with curated data views, inline annotations and AI-assisted insight suggestions to accelerate discovery.

projects.title: Conference Planning Data Platform
projects.shortContext: Platform to orchestrate conference logistics, scheduling and analytics for organizers.
projects.problem: Organizers lacked a single source of truth for planning and coordinating large events.
projects.solution: Designed a data platform connecting schedules, speaker profiles and analytics with first-class tooling for planners and partners.

projects.title: AI-Assisted Governance Dashboard
projects.shortContext: Decision-support dashboard combining human review with AI recommendations for governance teams.
projects.problem: Governance teams needed faster triage with explainable AI recommendations.
projects.solution: Implemented an AI-assisted review workflow with clear provenance, human-in-the-loop controls and visual explainability.
